answers.what_does_operator_currently_see: A read-only StaffordOS Command Center with the standard CEO primary-action card plus a ShopiFixer panel showing merchant identity, audit score, top issue, offer status, send allowance, payment status, fulfillment status, current stage, next required action, and readiness score.
answers.what_decision_can_operator_make: Ross can decide whether the ShopiFixer opportunity is ready to remain in a paid-pursuit state, whether payment collection is the next step, and whether the current offer should be treated as send-ready versus conversion-ready.
answers.what_action_can_operator_take: From this screen the operator can review the next required action and then move to collect a verified Stripe payment or inspect supporting revenue context; the screen itself is read-only and does not initiate payment or fulfillment.
what_information_is_still_missing: Proof that the merchant has actually paid
Before/after evidence for the active merchant
Proof package readiness and completion details
A direct ShopiFixer action button on the command center
answers.single_highest_value_ui_improvement: Add a dedicated ShopiFixer lifecycle card with explicit state transitions and a visible payment/fulfillment proof timeline instead of only summary pills.
answers.single_highest_value_operational_improve: Close the loop from verified Stripe payment into fulfillment proof-package readiness so the command center can move from status-only to execution-aware.
answers.single_highest_value_revenue_improvement: Convert the send-ready offer into a verified paid Fix Sprint and make the paid state visible immediately in the command center.

assessments.biggest_visibility_gap: The command center shows the lifecycle summary, but it does not yet expose a merchant-level proof timeline with payment verification, execution start, proof completion, and completion evidence in one place.
assessments.biggest_revenue_gap: The screen makes it clear that the offer is sent and ready, but it does not yet surface a paid state or make payment conversion friction obvious enough to drive immediate follow-through.
assessments.biggest_operational_gap: There is no operator-facing ShopiFixer workflow control on the screen; it is read-only, so the operator must leave the page to act on payment or fulfillment.
assessments.next_implementation_after_the_audit: Add a compact ShopiFixer lifecycle lane to /operator/command-center that shows payment verification, fulfillment start, proof package status, and a single next-action affordance tied to the current stage.
